title: Cheryltje's Ambient Music (Across The World edition)
description: Resource pack that adds my first album full of minecraft inspired songs into the game. These songs play randomly like the usual ambient music in Minecraft. My songs don't replace the songs that are already in game, but add 15 more songs.
body:
Resource pack that adds my first album full of minecraft inspired songs into the game as resource pack. These songs play randomly like the usual ambient music in Minecraft. My songs don't replace the songs that are already in game, but add 15 more songs.

You are not allowed to repost / edit / change this resource pack.

All the music in this resource pack is created by me (Cheryltje) without the use of AI.

All my socials are here: https://linktr.ee/cheryltje
